zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Wrenbury於1320年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親John Wrenbury28歲，母親Alice Aldersely30歲。她和Sir Hugh Massey至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1370年在英國英格蘭爾塔頓享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾塔頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Wrenbury于1320年出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲John Wrenbury28岁，母亲Alice Aldersely30岁。她和Sir Hugh Massey至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1370年在英国英格兰爾塔頓享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾塔頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Wrenbury was born in 1320, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Wrenbury, was 28 and her mother, Alice Aldersely, was 30. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Hugh Massey. She died in 1370, in Tatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Tatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Wrenbury est née en 1320, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wrenbury, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Aldersely, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Hugh Massey. Elle est décédée en 1370, à Tatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Tatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Wrenbury 1320 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wrenbury 28 und ihre Mutter Alice Aldersely 30. Sie hatte mit Sir Hugh Massey mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1370 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Tatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Wrenbury è nata il nel 1320 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Wrenbury, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Alice Aldersely, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Hugh Massey. Morì nel 1370, nel Tatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Tatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Wrenburyが1320年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Wrenburyは28歳，母Alice Alderselyは30歳であった。彼女はSir Hugh Masseyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1370年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアタットオンで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアタットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Wrenbury(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wrenbury(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Aldersely(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Sir Hugh Massey(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 타턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 타턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Wrenbury nasceu em 1320, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wrenbury, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Aldersely, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Hugh Massey. Ela faleceu em 1370, em Tatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Tatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Wrenbury родилась в 1320 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Wrenbury было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Aldersely, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Sir Hugh Massey. Она умерла в 1370 г. в местности таттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности таттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Wrenbury nació en 1320, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wrenbury, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Aldersely, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir Hugh Massey. Murió en 1370, en Tatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Tatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
